title: meridiana pavonia
intro: Meridiana pavonia, also known as the Butterfly Pea, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia and Australia. It is a climber with blue-violet flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Meridiana pavonia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting eye health, due to its high antioxidant content. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in culinary applications, such as a natural food coloring and flavoring agent.
